{{Missing Info|specifics=Robot amounts past 90}}

== Rebel Device ==
Rebel Device Cabin within [[Rocket]] Cabins

Send robots to gather: {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Mecha Cell}}<br>
Upgrade Rebel Cabin Tech to send more robots.
{| class="wikitable"
!Tech
!Robots
|-
|0-399||5
|-
|400-1,399||10
|-
|1,400-3,199||20
|-
|3,200-5,999||30
|-
|6,000-10,799||40
|-
|10,800-17,999||50
|-
|18,000-24,999||60
|-
|25,000-35,999||70
|-
|36,000-53,999||80
|-
|54,000-79,999||90
|-
|80,000-?||?
|}

==Photonic Communicator==
Each tier gives +1 to Angel Minion HP, ATK, DEF, and RUSH. <br> Each tier gives +1% to All Minion HP.
{| class="wikitable"
!Tier
!Required Materials
!Available Bonus
!Printing Supply Cost
|-
|1
|T1 Rebel Deck Plate x40<br>T1 Rebel Lens x40<br>T1 Rebel Radio x40<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tads x10K
|[[File:Travel-speedup.png|frameless|50x50px]] Travel Speedup +2h
|[[File:Engineering-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Engineering Printing Supply x30
|-
|2
|T2 Rebel Deck Plate x40<br>T2 Rebel Lens x40<br>T2 Rebel Radio x40<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tads x20K
|[[File:Travel-speedup.png|frameless|50x50px]] Travel Speedup +4h
|[[File:Engineering-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Engineering Printing Supply x60
|-
|3
|T3 Rebel Deck Plate x40<br>T3 Rebel Lens x40<br>T3 Rebel Radio x40<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tads x30K
|[[File:Travel-speedup.png|frameless|50x50px]] Travel Speedup +8h
|[[File:Engineering-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Engineering Printing Supply x120
|-
|4
|T4 Rebel Deck Plate x40<br>T4 Rebel Lens x40<br>T4 Rebel Radio x40<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tads x40K
|[[File:Travel-speedup.png|frameless|50x50px]] Travel Speedup +16h
|[[File:Engineering-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Engineering Printing Supply x200
|-
|5
|T5 Rebel Deck Plate x40<br>T5 Rebel Lens x40<br>T5 Rebel Radio x40<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tads x50K
|[[File:Travel-speedup.png|frameless|50x50px]] Travel Speedup +1d
|[[File:Engineering-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Engineering Printing Supply x300
|}

==Prismatic Armor==
Each tier gives +1 to Mecha Minion HP, ATK, DEF, and RUSH. <br> Each tier gives +1% to All Minion DEF.
{| class="wikitable"
!Tier
!Required Materials
!Available Bonus
!Printing Supply Cost
|-
|1
|40 T1 Rebel Deck Plate<br>40 T1 Rebel Lens<br>40 T1 Rebel Radio<br>10k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Coating Bucket, +3|orange}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Military Printing Supply, +30|red}}
|-
|2
|40 T2 Rebel Deck Plate<br>40 T2 Rebel Lens<br>40 T2 Rebel Radio<br>20k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Coating Bucket, +6|orange}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Military Printing Supply, +60|red}}
|-
|3
|40 T3 Rebel Deck Plate<br>40 T3 Rebel Lens<br>40 T3 Rebel Radio<br>30k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Coating Bucket, +12|orange}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Military Printing Supply, +120|red}}
|-
|4
|40 T4 Rebel Deck Plate<br>40 T4 Rebel Lens<br>40 T4 Rebel Radio<br>40k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Coating Bucket, +18|orange}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Military Printing Supply, +200|red}}
|-
|5
|40 T5 Rebel Deck Plate<br>40 T5 Rebel Lens<br>40 T5 Rebel Radio<br>50k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Coating Bucket, +24|orange}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Military Printing Supply, +300|red}}
|}

==Auto-reload Device==
Each tier gives +1 to Demon Minion HP, ATK, DEF, and RUSH. <br> Each tier gives +1% to All Minion ATK.
{| class="wikitable"
!Tier
!Required Materials
!Available Bonus
!Printing Supply Cost
|-
|1
|T1 Rebel Deck Plate x40<br>T1 Rebel Radio x40<br>T1 Rebel Polyester x40<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tads x10K
|[[File:Gear Chest.png|frameless|50x50px]] Gear Chest +100
|[[File:Military-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Military Printing Supply x30
|-
|2
|T2 Rebel Deck Plate x40<br>T2 Rebel Radio x40<br>T2 Rebel Polyester x40<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tads x20K
|[[File:Gear Chest.png|frameless|50x50px]] Gear Chest +200
|[[File:Military-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Military Printing Supply x60
|-
|3
|T3 Rebel Deck Plate x40<br>T3 Rebel Radio x40<br>T3 Rebel Polyester x40<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tads x30K
|[[File:Gear Chest.png|frameless|50x50px]] Gear Chest +400
|[[File:Military-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Military Printing Supply x120
|-
|4
|T4 Rebel Deck Plate x40<br>T4 Rebel Radio x40<br>T4 Rebel Polyester x40<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tads x40K
|[[File:Gear Chest.png|frameless|50x50px]] Gear Chest +800
|[[File:Military-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Military Printing Supply x200
|-
|5
|T4 Rebel Deck Plate x40<br>T5 Rebel Radio x40<br>T5 Rebel Polyester x40<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tads x50K
|[[File:Gear Chest.png|frameless|50x50px]] Gear Chest +1,600
|[[File:Military-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Military Printing Supply x300
|}

==Biochemical MOD Module==
Each tier gives +1 to Zombie Minion HP, ATK, DEF, and RUSH. <br> Each tier gives +1% to All Minion RUSH.
{| class="wikitable"
!Tier
!Required Materials
!Available Bonus
!Printing Supply Cost
|-
|1
|T1 Rebel Lens x40<br>T1 Rebel Radio x40<br>T1 Rebel Polyester x40<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tads x10K
|[[File:Organ-chest.png|frameless|50x50px|link=Organs]] Organ Chest +100
|[[File:Standard-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Standard Printing Supply x30
|-
|2
|T2 Rebel Lens x40<br>T2 Rebel Radio x40<br>T2 Rebel Polyester x40<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tads x20K
|[[File:Organ-chest.png|frameless|50x50px|link=Organs]] Organ Chest +200
|[[File:Standard-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Standard Printing Supply x60
|-
|3
|T3 Rebel Lens x40<br>T3 Rebel Radio x40<br>T3 Rebel Polyester x40<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tads x30K
|[[File:Organ-chest.png|frameless|50x50px|link=Organs]] Organ Chest +400
|[[File:Standard-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Standard Printing Supply x120
|-
|4
|T4 Rebel Lens x40<br>T4 Rebel Radio x40<br>T4 Rebel Polyester x40<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tads x40K
|[[File:Organ-chest.png|frameless|50x50px|link=Organs]] Organ Chest +600
|[[File:Standard-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Standard Printing Supply x200
|-
|5
|T5 Rebel Lens x40<br>T5 Rebel Radio x40<br>T5 Rebel Polyester x40<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tads x50K
|[[File:Organ-chest.png|frameless|50x50px|link=Organs]] Organ Chest +800
|[[File:Standard-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Standard Printing Supply x300
|}

==Anti-gravity Device==
Each tier gives +2 to Mecha Minion HP, ATK, DEF, and RUSH. <br> Each tier gives Per 100 Minions in battle, Troop Earth DMG +2%. <br> Each Tier gives Per 100 Minions in battle, Troop Earth RES +1%.
{| class="wikitable"
!Tier
!Required Materials
!Available Bonus
!Printing Supply Cost
|-
|1
|T1 Rebel Deck Plate x100<br>T1 Rebel Lens x100<br>T1 Rebel Nano Chip x5<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tads x20K
|[[File:Super Memetic Chest.png|frameless|100x50px]] Super Memetic Chest +50
|[[File:Engineering-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Engineering Printing Supply x50
|-
|2
|T2 Rebel Deck Plate x100<br>T2 Rebel Lens x100<br>T2 Rebel Nano Chip x5<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tads x40K
|[[File:Super Memetic Chest.png|frameless|100x50px]] Super Memetic Chest +100
|[[File:Engineering-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Engineering Printing Supply x100
|-
|3
|T3 Rebel Deck Plate x100<br>T3 Rebel Lens x100<br>T3 Rebel Nano Chip x5<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tads x60K
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Antigravity Golem|blue|Nursery#Minion_Skins}} (Minion Skin)
|[[File:Engineering-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Engineering Printing Supply x200
|-
|4
|T4 Rebel Deck Plate x100<br>T4 Rebel Lens x100<br>T4 Rebel Nano Chip x5<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tads x80K
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Antigravity Bone|purple}} +10
|[[File:Engineering-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Engineering Printing Supply x320
|-
|5
|T5 Rebel Deck Plate x100<br>T5 Rebel Lens x100<br>T5 Rebel Nano Chip x5<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tads x100K
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Antigravity Bone|purple}} +20
|[[File:Engineering-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Engineering Printing Supply x500
|}

==Dark Matter Reactor==
Each tier gives +2 to {{RewardIcon|Zombie Form Icon}}Zombie Minion HP, ATK, DEF, and RUSH. <br> Each tier gives {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}s collected from Drill Rig +2k. <br> Each tier gives {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad}}s collect from Drill Rig +30.
{| class="wikitable"
!Tier
!Required Materials
!Available Bonus
!Printing Supply Cost
|-
|1
|100 T1 Rebel Radio<br>100 T1 Rebel Polyester<br>5 T1 Rebel Nano Chip<br>20k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Divine Chaos Chest, +150|red}}
|50 {{RewardIconWithText|Standard Printing Supply}}
|-
|2
|100 T2 Rebel Radio<br>100 T2 Rebel Polyester<br>5 T2 Rebel Nano Chip<br>40k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Divine Chaos Chest, +300|red}}
|100 {{RewardIconWithText|Standard Printing Supply}}
|-
|3
|100 T3 Rebel Radio<br>100 T3 Rebel Polyester<br>5 T3 Rebel Nano Chip<br>60k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Dark Matter Ghost|blue|Nursery#Minion_Skins}} (Minion Skin)
|200 {{RewardIconWithText|Standard Printing Supply}}
|-
|4
|100 T4 Rebel Radio<br>100 T4 Rebel Polyester<br>5 T4 Rebel Nano Chip<br>80k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Dark Matter's Heart|purple}} +10
|320 {{RewardIconWithText|Standard Printing Supply}}
|-
|5
|100 T5 Rebel Radio<br>100 T5 Rebel Polyester<br>5 T5 Rebel Nano Chip<br>100k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Dark Matter's Heart|purple}} +20
|500 {{RewardIconWithText|Standard Printing Supply}}
|}

==Steel Hall==
Each tier gives +1 to All Minion HP, ATK, DEF, and RUSH. <br> Each tier gives In any Realm, Mecha Cells gained +2%. <br> Each tier gives All Minion HP +1%. Each tier gives All Minion DEF +1%.
{| class="wikitable"
!Tier
!Required Materials
!Available Bonus
!Printing Supply Cost
|-
|1
|T1 Rebel Deck Plate x200<br>T1 Rebel Radio x200<br>T1 Rebel Nano Chip x50<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tads x30K
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Silicon Life Prototype|green}}
|[[File:Engineering-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Engineering Printing Supply x100
|-
|2
|T2 Rebel Deck Plate x200<br>T2 Rebel Radio x200<br>T2 Rebel Nano Chip x50<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tads x60K
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad}} +3k
|[[File:Engineering-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Engineering Printing Supply x200
|-
|3
|T3 Rebel Deck Plate x200<br>T3 Rebel Radio x200<br>T3 Rebel Nano Chip x50<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tads x90K
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Grandmaster Scroll|orange}} +40
|[[File:Engineering-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Engineering Printing Supply x300
|-
|4
|T4 Rebel Deck Plate x200<br>T4 Rebel Radio x200<br>T4 Rebel Nano Chip x50<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tads x120K
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Aegis System|orange}} +40
|[[File:Engineering-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Engineering Printing Supply x600
|-
|5
|T5 Rebel Deck Plate x200<br>T5 Rebel Radio x200<br>T5 Rebel Nano Chip x50<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tads x150K
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Aegis System|orange}} +240
|[[File:Engineering-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Engineering Printing Supply x1000
|}

==Silence Hall==
Each tier gives +1 to All Minion HP, ATK, DEF, and RUSH. <br> Each tier gives In any Realm, Zombie Cells gained +2%. <br> Each tier gives All Gene Research SPD +1%. <br> Each tier gives Gene Research Free Speedup +24m.
{| class="wikitable"
!Tier
!Required Materials
!Available Bonus
!Printing Supply Cost
|-
|1
|T1 Rebel Lens x200<br>T1 Rebel Polyester x200<br>T1 Rebel Nano Chip x50<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tads x30K
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Sphere of Corrosion|green}}
|[[File:Standard-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Standard Printing Supply x100
|-
|2
|T2 Rebel Lens x200<br>T2 Rebel Polyester x200<br>T2 Rebel Nano Chip x50<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tads x60K
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket|orange}} +20
|[[File:Standard-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Standard Printing Supply x200
|-
|3
|T3 Rebel Lens x200<br>T3 Rebel Polyester x200<br>T3 Rebel Nano Chip x50<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tads x90K
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Grandmaster Scroll|orange}} +40
|[[File:Standard-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Standard Printing Supply x300
|-
|4
|T4 Rebel Lens x200<br>T4 Rebel Polyester x200<br>T4 Rebel Nano Chip x50<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tads x120K
|{{RewardIconWithLink|The Black Book|orange}} +40
|[[File:Standard-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Standard Printing Supply x600
|-
|5
|T5 Rebel Lens x200<br>T5 Rebel Polyester x200<br>T5 Rebel Nano Chip x50<br>[[File:B-tad.png|frameless|20x20px]] B-tads x150K
|{{RewardIconWithLink|The Black Book|orange}} +240
|[[File:Standard-printing-supply.png|frameless|50x50px]] Standard Printing Supply x1000
|}

==Links to Other Cabins==

* Cabin: [[Domain Device]]
* Cabin: [[Species Device]]
* Cabin: [[Demon God Device]]
* Cabin: [[Earth's Will Device]]

[[Category:Rocket]]
